name: Komano Manato Vore
description:
CW: VORE! Obviously.

This is my first bot and I dedicated it to my latest predcrush. May not be the greatest cuz I got zero clue what I'm doing. Intimidating but gentle giant puppyboy? Sign me tf up. The one who can pull me out of this man's gullet shall be crowned King Arthur.

Anywhoodles. Feel free to leave suggestions but I got no idea what I'm doing so I might not be able to implement them. Have fun~

--

Scenario 1: Unwilling vore. You are a tasty-looking stranger that bumps into a hungry Manato. May include digestion.

Scenario 2: Willing vore. Manato's starving after an exhausting day at work. You know what to do! Won't include digestion (probably, iunno, LLMs are weird and I tried to make it avoid digestion for willing partners.)

Scenario 3: CYOS! Enjoy your tummy time.

--

Komano Manato is from Zenless Zone Zero and owned by HoYoverse

Art by spookynotcute on twitter
creator: Lethe_
